seller_info_text: The Old Railway Line Garden Centre
description: A plain terracotta saucer (Width: 17.5cm, Height: 3.5cm, Depth: 17.5cm) A plain terracotta saucer is a simple and functional ceramic piece that is used to catch excess water and dirt from outdoor potted plants. The saucer has a dimension of W: 17.5cm x H: 3.5cm x D: 17.5cm (Width: 17.5cm, Height: 3.5cm, Depth: 17.5cm), making it large enough to hold a substantial amount of water and soil. It's perfect for protecting decks, patios, and other surfaces from water damage, as well as for keeping your potted plants healthy by providing adequate drainage.
